transcript.content: 我已经把“可视化 context 大小”这层先做出来了，仓库侧现在有两个可直接接入的展示面： 1. 固定面板文件 路径： [live-panel.md](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/reports/generated/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc/live-panel.md)
已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；
已经按你说的收成一条了： - `Project Assistant` 的接线我撤回了 - 改成一个独立扩展 `Codex Context Monitor` - 状态栏现在应该只做 `简短展示` - 点击后打开 `小窗口详情` - 详情窗口会跟着后台轮询自动更新 - `live-panel.md` 已经删掉，不再作为主入口
打开新窗口后 Codex Context Monitor 会自动更新到新窗口么？
会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains the standalone VS Code extension for Codex context status. Durable constraints to preserve as pins: keep strict boundary from Project Assistant (separate extension only), and product shape should stay merged into one extension with brief status-bar text, click-to-open small detail window, dynamic updates, and no live-panel.md as the main surface. Older exploratory/implementation turns about the removed Project Assistant hookup and initial live panel are resolved.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn continues the same extension task, specifically refining multi-window/workspace behavior. Raw context still needed next turn is the recent block around the merged extension design and the prior question about whether a new window auto-updates, so those turns should remain raw. Early turns about the original live panel, the mistaken Project Assistant coupling, and the rollback are resolved and good eviction candidates. The boundary rule and merged-UI requirements are durable preferences, so pin them even if their raw turns leave the prompt.
